title: Actually 3D Stuff
description: Some 3D stuff specially for Hold My Items Mod
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79bdb96b8891d772a180c262917e0ca05f4ca3f3.png)

    [![Requires Hold My Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29815fafca0ff68f0369052490e6ac2765b03b93.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
            [![Optional ResPackOpts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a748ebfa30b25770cf81a8cb639ece9ad2a9a62b.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)
> ### ℹ️ Info

**Resource pack reworks most items in 3d trying to do it in a vanilla-friendly way. Was inspired by Actions & Stuff by Overville studio**

## 

> ### ❔ Q&A

<details>
<summary>Here</summary>

**When backport to older version?** 

> Versions below 1.21.9 will most likely no longer be supported

**When port to newer versions?**

> At the moment resource pack is not recommended to use without Hold my items, so until hmi is released on new versions - there will be no port

**Can I use it in my modpack?**

> Sure

**Can I make an add-on?**

> Of course, as soon as it is approved on Modrinth, I will immediately add it to the addons section

**I found a bug/I have suggestions for additions. Where should I write?**

> Go to my [Discord](https://discord.gg/AP5sKGGPYh) server, where you will find channels for this

</details>


##
> ### ➕ Addons
[Actually 3D Clock](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/actually-3d-clock) by craftingc00kie

[Better Archeology 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-archeology-3d) by stradat
